articles.summary: It’s not unprecedented for struggling companies to latch on to the hot trend of the moment — remember the blockchain hype cycle?

articles.title: How the Globalstar purchase could turn Amazon’s Leo into a satellite powerhouse
articles.summary: The Globalstar deal may seem trivial relative to Amazon’s size, but it represents an “important signal” that Amazon is committed to space.

articles.title: Live Nation stock falls as jury finds ticketing giant acted as an illegal monopoly. Here’s what happens next.
articles.summary: Shares of Live Nation sank on Wednesday after a jury found that the Ticketmaster parent had acted as an illegal monopoly over the ticketing industry, according to reports.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading
articles.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.

articles.title: Wall Street still loves streaming, but are its affections well placed?
articles.summary: While streaming continues to drive media stocks, especially around quarterly earnings, it's not clear when it will start driving profits for smaller players.

articles.title: Delta Air Lines unveils first new Delta One suite in premium cabin arms race
articles.summary: Delta and other carriers are ramping up premium seats on board.
